title: amellus alternifolius subsp. angustissimus
intro: Amellus alternifolius subsp. angustissimus, commonly known as narrow-leaved rock rose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, although further research is needed to confirm these claims. Amellus alternifolius subsp. angustissimus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
